product_overview: 99Plus is a seat-conversion platform for CUET aspirants that combines a pixel-faithful NTA mock engine, deterministic eligibility locking, mark-leak diagnosis, and surgical practice sessions tied to admissions probability and monetization.
core_goals: Replicate the NTA exam interface with high fidelity and reliable autosave/submit behavior.
Provide deterministic eligibility validation and immutable hard-locks for CUET subject combinations.
Diagnose mistakes into NCERT-mapped mark leaks and auto-generate high-ROI practice sessions.
Convert test results into a Distance-to-Seat heatmap and target probability pipeline.
Enforce DPDP-compliant guardian consent for minors and auditable consent artifacts.
Support monetization via sachet credits and Pro Pass with robust webhook-driven entitlement updates.

features.name: Student Signup & Onboarding
features.description: Create student account, detect minors by DOB, create profile and onboarding state, and route student to eligibility subject selection when authenticated.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill full name -> Fill email -> Fill phone -> Fill DOB -> Fill password -> Select target universities -> Accept terms/privacy -> Click Create Account -> POST /api/auth/signup -> Receive session cookie (uid) -> Navigate to /onboarding/eligibility -> See subject selection UI
Navigate to /signup -> Leave required fields blank -> Click Create Account -> Client validates inputs -> Show inline validation errors (required fields)
Navigate to /signup -> Fill DOB indicating age < 18 -> Click Create Account -> POST /api/auth/signup -> See DPDP minor notice and student account moved to guardian_pending state

features.name: Guardian Consent (DPDP) Flow
features.description: Collect auditable guardian consent for minors via OTP or secure link, record consent artifact, and transition student account state to guardian_verified.
user_flows: After signup as minor -> See DPDP notice -> Click Request Guardian Consent -> Fill guardian name/phone/email -> Click Send OTP -> POST /api/guardian/request -> Guardian receives OTP link -> Guardian opens /guardian/consent/[token] or enters OTP -> Click Verify OTP -> POST /api/guardian/verify -> Server records consent_log and returns verified -> Student account_state becomes guardian_verified

After signup as minor -> Click Request Guardian Consent -> Fill guardian details -> Click Send OTP -> POST /api/guardian/request -> Guardian attempts OTP entry after expiry -> POST /api/guardian/verify -> Server responds token expired -> Show error 'OTP expired' -> Offer 'Resend OTP' with rate-limit notice

features.name: Hard-Locked Eligibility Guardian
features.description: Validate student subject combination against university/program rules, produce deterministic validation result, and create an immutable lock snapshot when valid.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding/eligibility -> Select class 12 stream -> Select board -> Select CUET subjects -> Select target university and program -> Click Verify Eligibility -> POST /api/eligibility/validate -> Server returns valid -> Insert eligibility_lock_snapshots and update student_profiles.account_state to eligibility_locked -> Show immutable locked subject tags and lock hash

Navigate to /onboarding/eligibility -> Select subjects that violate mandatory rules -> Click Verify Eligibility -> POST /api/eligibility/validate -> Server returns invalid with explicit mismatch reasons -> Display exact mismatch reasons and do not create lock

features.name: Pixel-Perfect NTA Mock Engine (Test UI)
features.description: High-fidelity NTA/TCS mock interface with instructions modal, language toggle, section tabs, countdown timer, question panel with bilingual content, action bar controls, question palette with five states, autosave and final submit.
user_flows: Navigate to /nta-test/[attemptId] -> See NtaInstructionsModal with marking scheme and palette legend -> Click Start Test -> POST /api/mock-attempts/start -> See NtaHeader with countdown timer -> See NtaSectionTabs -> See NtaQuestionPanel showing bilingual content -> Click NtaLanguageToggle -> Question updates to selected language -> Select option in NtaOptionList -> Click Save & Next (NtaActionBar) -> Debounced POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response -> Palette updates to answered state -> Repeat through questions -> Click Submit in NtaHeader -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/submit -> See submission confirmation

Navigate to /nta-test/[attemptId] -> See NtaInstructionsModal -> Click Start Test -> POST /api/mock-attempts/start -> Select option in NtaOptionList -> Debounced POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response -> Network error occurs -> Client enqueues response in offline retry queue -> Show offline saving indicator -> Retry POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response when online -> Show saved confirmation

Navigate to /nta-test/[attemptId] -> Start test and timer runs -> Timer reaches 00:00:00 -> Client auto-submits attempt -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/submit -> Show auto-submitted confirmation and lock attempt

features.name: Autosave, Local State & Offline Retry
features.description: Immediate local state updates on answer change, debounced backend upsert, and offline retry queue to avoid data loss and keep UI responsive.
user_flows: While on /nta-test/[attemptId] -> Select option in NtaOptionList -> Local client state updates immediately -> Debounce timer starts -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response (debounced) -> Server responds 200 -> Show 'Saved' indicator

While on /nta-test/[attemptId] -> Select option in NtaOptionList -> Local client state updates immediately -> Debounce triggers POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response -> POST fails due to network -> Client inserts response into offline retry queue -> Show offline icon and 'Saving queued' message -> On reconnect, client retries queued POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/response and updates palette state

features.name: Submission & Backend Scoring / Normalization
features.description: Submit attempt to lock it, compute raw score, run normalization/analytics jobs, generate mark leaks and update target heatmap and diagnostics.
user_flows: On /nta-test/[attemptId] after reviewing -> Click Submit in NtaHeader -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/submit -> Server locks attempt and computes raw_score -> Server triggers analytics job to compute simulated_normalized_score and mark_leaks -> Persist mock_attempt_scores and college_target_analytics -> Show submission success and link to diagnosis

On /nta-test/[attemptId] -> Click Submit -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/submit -> Server accepts request but analytics job fails or times out -> GET /api/diagnosis/[attemptId] returns 500 -> Show 'Diagnostics temporarily unavailable' with retry option

features.name: Diagnostics & Mark-Leak Generation
features.description: Map incorrect responses to syllabus nodes and NCERT pages, upsert mark_leaks, and surface Gap-Remedy recommendations with severity scores.
user_flows: After submission -> POST /api/mock-attempts/[id]/submit completes -> Background analytics job upserts mark_leaks per syllabus_node -> Generate list of mark_leaks with NCERT mappings -> Navigate to /diagnosis/[attemptId] -> See mark-leak list with severity and recommended Gap-Remedy sessions

After submission -> Background analytics job fails to produce mark_leaks -> Navigate to /diagnosis/[attemptId] -> GET /api/diagnosis/[attemptId] returns no data -> Show 'Diagnosis unavailable' and 'Retry analysis' CTA

features.name: Surgical Practice Sessions (Gap-Remedy / Topic Mastery / PYQ / Full Mock)
features.description: Start practice sessions derived from diagnosis or manual selection, enforce entitlements (Pro or credits), and update mark_leaks and analytics on completion.
user_flows: From /diagnosis/[attemptId] -> Click 'Start Gap-Remedy' on a leak -> POST /api/practice-sessions/start -> Server checks entitlement -> If Pro active or sufficient credits, create practice_session and return session_id -> Load practice questions -> Complete items -> POST /api/practice-sessions/[id]/complete -> Server updates practice_sessions and reduces mark_leak severity and updates college_target_analytics

From /diagnosis/[attemptId] -> Click 'Start Gap-Remedy' -> POST /api/practice-sessions/start -> Server checks entitlement -> Insufficient credits and no Pro -> Return blocked status -> Show paywall with 'Buy Sachet' CTA -> Click Buy Sachet -> POST /api/payments/order -> Receive order details -> Open Razorpay checkout -> On client success wait for webhook
From practice list -> Choose Topic Mastery mode -> POST /api/practice-sessions/start -> If session creation fails due to server error -> Show 'Unable to start session' and offer retry

features.name: Payments, Entitlements & Webhook Processing
features.description: Create payment orders, integrate Razorpay checkout, process idempotent webhooks to update surgical_credits and subscriptions, and unlock entitlements server-side.
user_flows: From paywall or Buy flow -> Click Buy -> POST /api/payments/order -> Receive Razorpay order payload -> Open Razorpay checkout -> Customer completes payment -> Razorpay posts to /api/webhooks/razorpay -> Server verifies signature -> Insert payment_webhook_events and update payment_orders -> Insert surgical_credits ledger row -> Client refetches entitlements and sees updated credit balance

From paywall -> Click Buy -> POST /api/payments/order -> Payment succeeds in client but webhook signature verification fails -> /api/webhooks/razorpay returns 400 -> Server does not update surgical_credits -> UI shows payment pending and instructs waiting for confirmation or support

routes.description: NTA/TCS iON pixel-faithful mock exam interface. Requires uid cookie. Main features: instructions modal, countdown timer, section tabs, MCQ question panel with bilingual support, question palette (5 states: not_visited/not_answered/answered/marked_for_review/answered_and_marked), Save&Next, Clear Response, Mark for Review, autosave to API, submit flow.

api_endpoints.description: Create or resume a mock attempt
Submit attempt, compute score, NTA normalization

key_components.name: NtaTestShell
key_components.description: Root client component managing test state via useReducer

key_components.name: NtaInstructionsModal
key_components.description: Pre-test instructions screen with marking scheme and palette legend

key_components.name: NtaHeader
key_components.description: Dark blue NTA-branded header with countdown timer and submit button

key_components.name: NtaQuestionPanel
key_components.description: Question display with bilingual content and option list

key_components.name: NtaOptionList
key_components.description: MCQ radio options A-D with selection highlighting

key_components.name: NtaActionBar
key_components.description: Save & Next, Clear Response, Mark for Review buttons

key_components.name: NtaQuestionPalette
key_components.description: Right sidebar numbered grid with 5 color states

key_components.name: NtaPaletteLegend
key_components.description: Color legend with live counters per state

key_components.name: NtaTimer
key_components.description: HH:MM:SS countdown, red flash under 5 minutes

authentication.description: httpOnly session cookie containing the student user_id UUID
